scope.basket_context: Drone/Defense focus ($RCAT, $ONDS, $UMAC, $RKLB, $PLTR, $KTOS), Health Technology ($DFTX) and broader market implications

local_physics.speculative_exhaustion: IF SPX > Highs AND RSP = FLAT THEN TAG 'SPECULATIVE_EXHAUSTION' (Triggers ENH_09 Gate)
local_physics.forensic_skew: IF Price > VWAP AND rVol > 1.5 THEN TAG 'Bullish Skew (ENH_18)' ELSE 'Noise'
local_physics.gamma_trap: IF abs(distance_from_vwap) < 0.25 AND net_gex_total > 0 THEN TAG 'Call Wall Compression'
local_physics.regulatory_headwind: IF Ticker IN ['RCAT', 'ONDS','UMAC', 'KTOS'] AND Risk_Regime = 'CRITICAL' THEN TAG 'ENH_08 Shutdown Risk'
local_physics.supply_chain_penalty: IF UMAC_8K_DELAY = TRUE THEN Apply -15% Narrative Health (ENH_10)

context_write_protocol.action: Append any triggered tags (e.g., 'SPECULATIVE_EXHAUSTION', 'ENH_08 Shutdown Risk').
context_write_protocol.note: Critical for closing Execution Engine Bifurcation Gate.

ticker_summaries.summary: Forensic narrative based on ENH logic blocks.
